description: Companion output profile for bounded safe deferral guidance, outbound notifications, audit logging, and local warning outputs. This asset complements but does not override canonical policy or schema truth.

voice_feedback.policy_linkage_note: Voice feedback may support bounded safe deferral guidance and system status communication, but it must not become an open-ended dialogue path or override policy-controlled routing outcomes.
voice_feedback.purpose: Cloud-independent bounded voice guidance for safe deferral feedback and limited system announcements

outbound_notification.caregiver_confirmation_note: Caregiver confirmation support remains bounded by the canonical low-risk action policy and must not authorize actions outside the approved low-risk action catalog.
outbound_notification.companion_asset_note: This output profile describes preferred output behavior and channel use, but the payload contract itself remains governed by the canonical Class 2 notification schema.
outbound_notification.purpose: Caregiver alerts, bounded escalation payload delivery, and limited approval-path support

local_warning_output.scope_note: Local warning outputs are policy-controlled safety outputs and should not be interpreted as equivalent to the Class 1 low-risk autonomous actuation taxonomy.
local_warning_output.purpose: Bounded local warning outputs for emergency or safety-critical feedback under policy control
